text.title: PM 1:1 Template (Engineering / Design) Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of PM 1:1 Template (Engineering / Design).

example.scenario: Solo PM with designer-x (4 months in). Biweekly 30-min 1:1; this week career talked design-systems, project /pricing shipped, craft Figma variables, blocker /home hero copy, feedback bidirectional. Notes appended to per-person Notion doc.
